CustomField.formula: IF( !ISBLANK(Start_Date__c), CASE(MONTH(Start_Date__c), 1, "Jan", 2, "Feb", 3, "Mar", 4, "Apr", 5, "May", 6, "Jun", 7, "Jul", 8, "Aug", 9, "Sep", 10, "Oct", 11, "Nov", 12, "Dec", "" ) + " " + TEXT(DAY(Start_Date__c)) + "/" + RIGHT(TEXT(YEAR(Start_Date__c)), 2) + " " + SUBSTITUTE(Start_Time_Text__c, " ", "") + IF( !ISBLANK(End_Date__c), IF( Start_Date__c = End_Date__c, " to " + SUBSTITUTE(End_Time_Text__c, " ", ""), " to " + CASE(MONTH(End_Date__c), 1, "Jan", 2, "Feb", 3, "Mar", 4, "Apr", 5, "May", 6, "Jun", 7, "Jul", 8, "Aug", 9, "Sep", 10, "Oct", 11, "Nov", 12, "Dec", "" ) + " " + TEXT(DAY(End_Date__c)) + "/" + RIGHT(TEXT(YEAR(End_Date__c)), 2) + " " + SUBSTITUTE(End_Time_Text__c, " ", "") ), "" ) + IF( !ISBLANK(Location__c), " @ " + Location__c, "" ), "" )
CustomField.label: Event Details
